module.name: netgraph
module.description: A small node-edge graph (SVG, circular layout): edges like "A -> B weight" (directed) or "A - B" (undirected). For graph theory, state machines, networks.
module.aiSpec:
A NODE-EDGE GRAPH laid out on a circle — for graph theory, small state machines, simple networks. Block module: one edge or node per line (sections optional): `A -> B` directed edge, `A - B` undirected edge, `A -> B 0.5` edge with a label (anything after the second node), `A` a lone node (to include an isolated vertex). Nodes are created automatically from edges and placed clockwise in first-appearance order. Params: `color` (node fill/stroke color, default var(--accent-color)). Keep it small (≤ ~10 nodes); use @drawio for big diagrams, @flow for flowcharts. (Not @graph — that wraps a figure image.)
<!-- @netgraph --> A -> B B -> C 2 C - A <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Node color
param.desc: Fill and outline color of the node circles.

snippet.label: Node-edge graph
snippet.text: <!-- @netgraph --> A -> B B -> C 2 C - A <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Small circular-layout graph from "A -> B" / "A - B" edge lines.
